column1: User Story 1: Log into the System
column2:
User Story 1: Log into the System
User Story: As someone who wants to place orders, I want to log into the system using my phone number and password, so that I can access my account and place orders.
column3:
Scenario: User logs into the system using phone number and password
  Given a user with a registered phone number and password
  When the user attempts to log in with their phone number and password
  Then the user should be granted access to their account
  And the user should be able to place orders

column2:
User Story 2: Register New User
User Story: As someone who wants to place orders, I want to register in the system by entering my full name, phone number, password, and password confirmation, so that I can create an account and start placing orders.
column3:
Scenario: Register a new user successfully
  Given a user wants to register in the system
  And the user is on the registration page
  When the user enters their full name, phone number, password, and password confirmation
  And the user submits the registration form
  Then the user should see a confirmation message
  And the user should be able to log in with the registered credentials

column2:
User Story 3: View Shopping Cart
User Story: As someone who wants to place orders, I want to view my shopping cart, so that I can review the items I have selected before completing the purchase.
column3:
Scenario: View items in the shopping cart
  Given a user has selected items to purchase
  And the user is on the shopping cart page
  When the user views the shopping cart
  Then the user should see a list of selected items
  And the user should see the total price of the items

column1: User Story 4: Add Product to Cart
column2:
User Story 4: Add Product to Cart
User Story: As someone who wants to place orders, I want to add products to the cart, so that I can select the items I want to buy.
column3:
Scenario: Add a product to the cart
  Given a user is on the product page
  When the user clicks the "Add to Cart" button
  Then the product should be added to the cart
  And the cart should display the added product

column1: User Story 5: Remove Product from Cart
column2:

column3:

  When the user removes a product from the cart
  Then the product should no longer be in the cart
  And the cart total should be updated accordingly

column2:
User Story 6: Pay for Order
User Story: As someone who wants to place orders, I want to pay for my order using Pix or card, so that I can complete the purchase quickly and conveniently.
column3:

  Given a user wants to place an order
  And the user has items in the cart
  When the user chooses to pay using Pix or card

  And the user should receive a confirmation message

column1: User Story 7: Add Note to Order
column2:

column2:

  Then the product should no longer be in the cart
  And the cart should be updated accordingly

column2:
User Story 6: Pay for Order
As a customer,
I want to pay for my order,
So that I can complete the purchase and receive my products.
column3:
Scenario: Customer pays for an order
  Given a customer has items in their cart
  And the customer is on the checkout page
  When the customer enters valid payment details
  And the customer confirms the payment
  Then the order should be processed
  And the customer should receive an order confirmation

column2:
User Story 7: Access Menu
As a customer,
I want to access the menu,
So that I can see the available options to purchase.
column3:
Scenario: Customer accesses the menu to see available options
  Given a customer is on the homepage
  When the customer clicks on the menu button
  Then the menu should be displayed
  And the customer should see the available options to purchase

column1: User Story 8: Add Note to Order
column2:
User Story 8: Add Note to Order
As a customer,
I want to add a note to my order,
So that I can communicate additional details to the seller.
column3:
Scenario: Add a note to an order
  Given a customer has an active order
  When the customer adds a note to the order
  Then the note should be saved with the order
  And the seller should be able to view the note

column2:
User Story 9: Manage Orders
As an owner/employee,
I want to manage orders,
So that I can track and process customer requests.
column3:
Scenario: Track and process customer orders
  Given an owner/employee is logged into the order management system
  And there are pending customer orders
  When the owner/employee views the order list
  Then the pending orders should be displayed
  And the owner/employee can update the status of each order

column1: User Story 10: Mark Order as Ready
column2:
User Story 10: Mark Order as Ready
As an owner/employee,
I want to mark an order as ready,
So that I can indicate that the order has been prepared and is ready for delivery.
column3:
Scenario: Mark an order as ready for delivery
  Given an order has been prepared
  And the order is in the system
  When the owner/employee marks the order as ready
  Then the order status should be updated to "Ready for delivery"
  And the customer should be notified that the order is ready

column1: User Story 11: Mark Order as Delivered
column2:
User Story 11: Mark Order as Delivered
As an owner/employee,
I want to mark an order as delivered,
So that I can update the order status in the system.
column3:
Scenario: Mark an order as delivered
  Given an order is in the system
  And the order status is "In Progress"
  When the owner/employee marks the order as delivered
  Then the order status should be updated to "Delivered"

column2:
User Story 12: Edit Menu Product
As an owner/employee,
I want to edit a menu product,
So that I can update the information of the offered items.
column3:
Scenario: Edit a menu product to update its information
  Given an owner/employee is logged into the system
  And the owner/employee is on the menu management page
  When the owner/employee selects a product to edit
  And updates the product information
  Then the product information should be updated in the system
  And the updated product information should be displayed on the menu

column1: User Story 13: Add New Product to Menu
column2:
User Story 13: Add New Product to Menu
As an owner/employee,
I want to add a new product to the menu,
So that I can offer more options to customers.
column3:
Scenario: Add a new product to the menu
  Given an owner/employee is logged into the system
  And the menu management page is open
  When the owner/employee adds a new product with valid details
  Then the new product should be added to the menu
  And the product should be visible to customers

column1: User Story 14: Remove Product from Menu
column2:
User Story 14: Remove Product from Menu
As an owner/employee,
I want to remove a product from the menu,
So that I can ensure the menu is always up to date.
column3:
Scenario: Remove a product from the menu
  Given the user is logged in as an owner/employee
  And the user is on the menu management page
  When the user selects a product to remove
  And confirms the removal
  Then the product should no longer be listed on the menu
  And the menu should be updated immediately

column2:
TIP: Customer Satisfaction Evaluation
As a customer,
I want to rate my experience with the order,
So that I can provide feedback on the service and products.
column3:
Scenario: Customer rates their order experience
  Given a customer has completed an order
  When the customer rates their experience
  Then the feedback should be recorded
  And the customer should see a confirmation message

column2:
TIP: Repeat Last Order
As a customer,
I want to repeat my last order,
So that I can make a new purchase quickly.
column3:
Scenario: Repeat last order to make a new purchase quickly
  Given a customer has a previous order
  And the customer is logged into their account
  When the customer selects the option to repeat the last order
  Then the last order is added to the cart
  And the customer can proceed to checkout
